message:
test(fcp-core): pin PostureAttestation Display + JSON shape + predicate truth tables

Adds crates/fcp-core/tests/connector_attestation_display.rs (~363 LOC) as
the closest standalone analogue for the bead's
"ConnectorAttestation Display" pinning request — no type literally named
`ConnectorAttestation` exists in fcp-core. Three attestation types live
in the crate:

  - SupplyChainAttestation — already pinned by signed_attestation_roundtrip.rs (o0grt)
  - NodeKeyAttestation     — needs a real Ed25519 owner-signature fixture; deferred
  - PostureAttestation     — fully constructible via public fields; pinned here

The pre-existing posture_tests.rs covers behavioural validity but does
not freeze the wire shape. This pin closes that gap:

  * 9-field JSON shape (schema, attestation_id, node_id, attributes,
    issued_at, expires_at, verifier_id, signature, verifier_kid)
  * SCHEMA = "fcp.posture.v1" string constant
  * is_valid truth table: NOT expired AND schema matches
  * is_expired vs is_expired_at boundary alignment
  * is_for_node identity sentinel
  * Attribute getter helpers: disk_encryption_enabled, os_version, os_type
  * PostureAttributeKey 11-variant snake_case serde + as_str alignment
    (Custom is the only payload-bearing variant)
  * PostureAttributeValue untagged shape (Bool/String/Number) so consumers
    can dispatch on JSON primitive type without a tag field

Bead context: flywheel_connectors-v8tvx asked for ConnectorAttestation
Display + serde pinning. PostureAttestation is the substitution; the bead
remains in_progress pending separate coverage of NodeKeyAttestation once
a key-ceremony fixture lands.
